top_signals.title: Kuwait says intercepting 'aerial targets' after U.S. military strikes multiple targets in Iran
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indonesian Bonds Resume Decline as Market Confidence Stays Weak
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s  bond selloff resumed on Thursday after a surprise interest-rate hike earlier this week provided only temporary relief, with investors once again focusing on the broader economic concerns that have fueled a market rout.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Lawmakers Fighting to Modernize the Pentagon
top_signals.summary:
Congress rarely moves fast, but Reps. Rob Wittman and Pat Ryan are trying to change that. The two lawmakers founded the bipartisan House Defense Modernization Caucus in 2024 and have driven reforms through two consecutive defense authorization acts, targeting acquisitions and other bottlenecks. Jonathan sits down with both congressmen to discuss their initiatives, how a caucus without markup power actually moves legislation, and whether bipartisan cooperation on defense can last.Image: Sgt. 1st Class Rakeem Carter via DVIDS.

The post The Lawmakers Fighting to Modernize the Pentagon appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The ‘Miasma’ worm source code briefly leaked on GitHub
top_signals.summary: The Miasma credential-stealing attack framework, which has recently targeted open-source ecosystems through supply-chain attacks, was briefly open-sourced on GitHub. [...]
